title: Toy Cars, 10Pcs Car Racing Games with Mat & Launcher, Pull Back Cars for Kids, Micro Machines Featuring Diecast Metal Shells, Kids' Play Vehicles, Birthday Party Gifts, Boys Toys Age 3 4 5 6 7
features: Innovative Launcher Design: Two car-shaped launchers with easy-to-press buttons ensure fair and fun toy car races.

Exquisite Pull-Back Car Set: Includes 10 pull-back toy cars (variety of colors and patterns, randomly packed), 2 launchers, 8 obstacles, 1 play mat, and a storage bag for easy organization and transport.
Metal Shell and Rounded Corners: The metal shell and plastic bottom can withstand multiple races and adventures, while the rounded corners prevent any potential scratches for children.

Educational Toy: The mini pull-back cars help improve hand-eye coordination and early learning skills. The 2.67-inch size is perfect for small hands, and can travel a long distance with a simple pull-back action.

Ideal Gift Choice: This toy car set is a great gift for kids on birthdays, Christmas, Thanksgiving, and other holidays, as well as perfect for party favors, mini car collections, or classroom rewards.
description: From the manufacturer Package includes 10 pull-back toy cars (variety of colors and patterns, randomly packed), 2 launchers 8 obstacles 1 play mat with a storage bag for easy storage and portability Metal Shell And Rounded Corner Design The shell of toy cars is thin metal with elasticity, the bottom of the car is plastic, ensuring they can withstand many races and adventures. The rounded corner design can prevent children from scratching. Fun to race Toy car set help improve hand-eye coordination and early preschool development skills. Two car-shaped launchers with easy-to-press buttons ensure fair and fun toy car races. Just pull back and you can make the car travel a long distance. Perfect Gift for Kids! This toy car set is the perfect gift for kids for birthdays, Christmas, Thanksgiving, weddings and other holidays, or as a party favor, mini car collection, or classroom reward.
